DECLARATION OF RYAN STEVENS IN SUPPORT OF DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO?S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 69085803) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR NONCOMPLIANCE WITH CCP 430.41, WHICH REQUIRES THAT THE PARTIES CONDUCT A "MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE" BEFORE A DEMURRER IS FILED. A DECLARATION MUST THEN BE FILED WHICH SPECIFIES WHETHER THE MEET AND CONFER WAS IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER IMMEDIATELY AND THE RESPONSE IS NOW DUE BY MAY 5, 2023. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-01-2023 Off Calendar

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-04-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

City and County of San Francisco's Demurrer is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 430.41, which requires that the parties conduct a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a demurrer is filed. A declaration must then be filed which specifies whether the meet and confer was in person or by telephone. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately and the response is now due by May 5, 2023.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
